beIN SPORTS 2.title: Sporting Cristal (PER) vs Carabobo (VEN) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Phase 3 - 2nd Leg

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Bologna vs Roma - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Bologna vs Roma - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Bologna have lost just one of their last six matches against fellow Serie A side Roma in all competitions  but it was in the most recent league meeting in August this season, a 1-0 away defeat. Roma have met fellow Italian opponents in three previous European ties: they lost over two legs to Internazionale in the 1991 UEFA Cup final  and Fiorentina in the 2014-15 UEFA Europa League last 16  but knocked out Milan in the 2023-24 Europa League quarter-final.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Nottingham Forest vs Midtjylland - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Nottingham Forest vs Midtjylland - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Nottingham Forest and FC Midtjylland have already faced in the UEFA Europa League this season, with the Danish side beating Ange Postecoglou’s Forest side 3-2 at the City Ground in October. FC Midtjylland have won four of their nine matches against English sides in all European competitions, with all four wins coming against different clubs.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Manchester City will face Real Madrid for the 16th time in the UEFA Champions League, twice as often as they have faced any other team in the competition. This will be the first time two teams have met in the knockout phase of the competition in five consecutive seasons. Only Bayern Munich  and Juventus  have won more UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid than Manchester City, who beat them 2-1 in this season's league phase.
